title: EVA ON TV
wikitext:
[]: EVA ON TV             Quote Post by closet nerd » Sat Aug 27, 2011 7:00 pm I have direct tv with the basic channels package. Where can I find it if at all?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Aug 27, 2011 7:40 pm I picked it up in the vegetable aisle. The reception was unfortunately terrible, but you can't win them all.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Aug 27, 2011 7:41 pm ...

[]: Re: EVA ON TV             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Aug 27, 2011 8:15 pm closet nerd wrote: I have direct tv with the basic channels package. Where can I find it if at all?

[]: Eva TV B)             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Aug 27, 2011 8:18 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Maybe you can find it on Netflix?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon Aug 29, 2011 11:52 am I don't think NGE has been on TV in the US since 2007 IIRC?

[]: Re: EVA ON TV             Quote Post by Someone » Mon Aug 29, 2011 11:59 am closet nerd wrote: Where can I find it if at all?

[]: Re: EVA ON TV             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 29, 2011 12:22 pm Someone wrote: Yar-har, fiddle-dee-dee.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Mon Aug 29, 2011 8:21 pm The cheapest way to get a new copy of the Eva TV series is @ Right Stuf . $39.99 + shipping...

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Aug 31, 2011 10:40 am It might be on Anime Network On Demand, if you have that - otherwise you're SOL. It's not on US TV (and hasn't been for years) and it's (infuriatingly) not on Netflix Streaming. So you're just going to have to get the DVDs.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 31, 2011 12:10 pm gatotsu911 wrote: It might be on Anime Network On Demand, if you have that - otherwise you're SOL. It's not on US TV (and hasn't been for years) and it's (infuriatingly) not on Netflix Streaming. So you're just going to have to get the DVDs.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Aug 31, 2011 1:01 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I don't see any indication as to whether it's subbed or dubbed.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Aug 31, 2011 1:08 pm gatotsu911 wrote: I think they do both, so it could be either, but my money's on dubbed. Anime Network only still exists in on-demand form, and is only available through certain cable providers (Comcast, I think; not Verizon).

[]: Just go buy the DVDs already.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Sep 05, 2011 8:27 pm The first time I ever saw NGE was on the Anime On Demand channel, back around 2005. Good times.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Sep 05, 2011 11:30 pm Tarnsman wrote: (ANIME NETWORK ON-DEMAND! ALL THE HOTTEST HITS OUT OF Japan! ONLY ON CHANNEL ONE!)

[]: Still not here. B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Sep 06, 2011 4:05 am The Eva Monkey wrote: http://www.theanimenetwork.com/Watch-Online/AZIndex I don't see any indication as to whether it's subbed or dubbed.

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Fri Sep 09, 2011 7:55 pm I stream anime from animefreak or get the disks for Netflix.
summary:
[]: EVA ON TV             Quote Post by closet nerd » Sat Aug 27, 2011 7:00 pm I have direct tv with the basic channels package. Where can I find it if at all?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Aug 27, 2011 7:40 pm I picked it up in the vegetable aisle. The reception was unfortunately terrible, but you can't win them all.

[]:        &n
